'''vonasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vodkaless|vodkaless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vodkaless|vodkaless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vonasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vonasithi|vonasithi]] || [[word:vonasiji|vonasiji]] || [[word:vonasishi|vonasishi]] || [[word:vonasiki|vonasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vonasuthuthu|vonasuthuthu]] || [[word:vonasujuju|vonasujuju]] || [[word:vonasushushu|vonasushushu]] || [[word:vonasukuku|vonasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vonasuthu|vonasuthu]] || [[word:vonasuju|vonasuju]] || [[word:vonasushu|vonasushu]] || [[word:vonasuku|vonasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vonasufthuf|vonasufthuf]] || [[word:vonasufjuf|vonasufjuf]] || [[word:vonasufshuf|vonasufshuf]] || [[word:vonasufkuf|vonasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vonasethe|vonasethe]] || [[word:vonaseje|vonaseje]] || [[word:vonaseshe|vonaseshe]] || [[word:vonaseke|vonaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vonasothotho|vonasothotho]] || [[word:vonasojojo|vonasojojo]] || [[word:vonasoshosho|vonasoshosho]] || [[word:vonasokoko|vonasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vonasotho|vonasotho]] || [[word:vonasojo|vonasojo]] || [[word:vonasosho|vonasosho]] || [[word:vonasoko|vonasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vonasofthof|vonasofthof]] || [[word:vonasofjof|vonasofjof]] || [[word:vonasofshof|vonasofshof]] || [[word:vonasofkof|vonasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vonas챦fth챦f|vonas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fj챦f|vonas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fsh챦f|vonas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fk챦f|vonas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vonas챦fth챦fth챦f|vonas챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fj챦fj챦f|vonas챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fsh챦fsh챦f|vonas챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fk챦fk챦f|vonas챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vonas챦fth챦f|vonas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fj챦f|vonas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fsh챦f|vonas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fk챦f|vonas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vonas챦fth챦f|vonas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fj챦f|vonas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fsh챦f|vonas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:vonas챦fk챦f|vonas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vonas챈th챈|vonas챈th챈]] || [[word:vonas챈j챈|vonas챈j챈]] || [[word:vonas챈sh챈|vonas챈sh챈]] || [[word:vonas챈k챈|vonas챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vonasathatha|vonasathatha]] || [[word:vonasajaja|vonasajaja]] || [[word:vonasashasha|vonasashasha]] || [[word:vonasakaka|vonasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vonasatha|vonasatha]] || [[word:vonasaja|vonasaja]] || [[word:vonasasha|vonasasha]] || [[word:vonasaka|vonasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vonasafthaf|vonasafthaf]] || [[word:vonasafjaf|vonasafjaf]] || [[word:vonasafshaf|vonasafshaf]] || [[word:vonasafkaf|vonasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vonasasha|vonasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vonash챘sha|vonash챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vonasrosha|vonasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vonasmusha|vonasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vonasyasha|vonasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govonasnksh챘sha|govonasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govonasnkrosha|govonasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govonasnkmusha|govonasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govonasnkyasha|govonasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vonanasasha|vonanasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vonanash챘sha|vonanash챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vonanasrosha|vonanasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vonanasmusha|vonanasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vonanasyasha|vonanasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govonanasnksh챘sha|govonanasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govonanasnkrosha|govonanasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govonanasnkmusha|govonanasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govonanasnkyasha|govonanasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ven챈sasha|ven챈sasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ven챈sh챘sha|ven챈sh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ven챈srosha|ven챈srosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ven챈smusha|ven챈smusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ven챈syasha|ven챈syasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goven챈snksh챘sha|goven챈snksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goven챈snkrosha|goven챈snkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goven챈snkmusha|goven챈snkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goven챈snkyasha|goven챈snkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vonfasasha|vonfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vonfash챘sha|vonfash챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vonfasrosha|vonfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vonfasmusha|vonfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vonfasyasha|vonfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govonfasnksh챘sha|govonfasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govonfasnkrosha|govonfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govonfasnkmusha|govonfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govonfasnkyasha|govonfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
